prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7362名、2026年计划大幅缩招20.2%（推动位次前移）、学校层次高且抖音热度持续升温（吸引更多考生报考，部分抵 消缩招效应）、物理类考生总数略有减少（竞争略缓和）等因素，预计2026年物理类录取最低位次约6521名，较2025年前移约841名；位次区间6021–7021名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7038 → 7427 → 8574 → 8140 → 7362, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend, peaking at 8574 in 2023 before declining in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7362, with a slight forward movement in the past two years; the enrollment plan for Hunan University in Chongqing Physics Category was 114 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 118 in 2024, and 119 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year; in 2026, the plan is significantly reduced to 95, a decrease of about 20.2% compared to 2025, which is the most significant supply-demand change factor this year, and the reduction will intensify competition and push the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities; no significant negative events in reputation evaluation in 2026; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained rising attention from examinees; no signal of Hunan University's admission gap in historical abnormal admission records, stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, totaling 8 A-/A/A+ disciplines, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting examinees.
6. [Professional Popularity and Environment] Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended or recommended in the 2026 professional popularity analysis, with high social application heat; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is about 129,600 (total examinees 209,000, estimated based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 62%), a slight decrease from 139,500 in 2025, slightly easing the competitive environment. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the same Southwest/Central China region as Chongqing, with moderate geographical distance and stable cross-province application preference; the number of students enrolled in Chongqing accounts for about 2–3% of the total national enrollment, at a medium level, with no special regional preference signal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7362, the significant enrollment reduction of 20.2% in 2026 (pushing the ranking forward), the high school level and continuously rising Douyin popularity (attracting more examinees to apply, partially offsetting the reduction effect), and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees (slightly easing competition), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 6521, moving forward by about 841 compared to 2025; the ranking range is 6021–7021.

For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6000), focus on Tier 1 top majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 7000), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1192 → 1244 → 1384 → 1808 → 1458, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, peaking at 1808 in 2024 before moving significantly forward to 1458 in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1458, moving forward by about 350 positions in the past year; enrollment plans for this university in Chongqing's History Category were 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 20 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan drastically expands to 49 students, a 145% increase compared to 2025, making it the most significant supply-demand change factor this year, which will lead to significantly intensified competition and a substantial backward shift in admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; no significant negative events in reputation evaluation for 2026; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising candidate attention; no signal of Hunan University's admission gap in historical abnormal records, stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration was rated A, Applied Economics A-, directly corresponding to History Category enrollment majors such as Accounting, Finance, and Economics, with strong disciplinary strength; majors like Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, though not individually rated, rely on the university's comprehensive strength and have strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other majors are recommended or slightly hot in the 2026 major popularity analysis; Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended; Finance/Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Chongqing for 2026 is about 79,400 (total candidates 209,000, estimated based on recent History Category proportion of about 38%), a slight increase from 73,400 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the same Southwest/Central China region as Chongqing, with moderate geographical distance and stable cross-province application preferences; the proportion of this university's enrollment in Chongqing to total national enrollment is about 2–3%, at a medium level, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1458, the 2026 plan's drastic 145% expansion (pushing rankings significantly backward), the university's high level and continuously rising Douyin popularity (attracting more candidates to apply, further intensifying competition), and a slight increase in the total number of History Category candidates (slightly intensifying competition), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2696, moving backward by about 1238 positions compared to 2025; the ranking range is 2292–3100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- None (History Category has only 5 enrollment majors in 2026, all already classified into Tier 1 and Tier 2).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2696, range 2292–3100. Candidates with rankings within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a reach; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2300) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Accounting, Finance, and Economics; those with rankings near the upper limit (around 3100) should mainly target Tier 2 majors. History Category has few enrollment majors, with clear ranking gradients between majors; it is recommended to choose based on personal interest and discipline evaluation levels.
